questions.text: To construct a triangle, we need minimum:
questions.explanation: To construct a unique triangle, we need at least 3 elements (sides and/or angles).

questions.text: SSS criterion requires three sides to construct a triangle.
questions.explanation: SSS (Side-Side-Side) criterion: A triangle can be constructed when all three sides are given.

questions.text: What is the sum of angles in a triangle?
questions.explanation: The angle sum property of a triangle states that the sum of all three interior angles is always 180°.

questions.text: A triangle can be constructed if sum of any two sides is ________ than the third side.
questions.explanation: Triangle inequality theorem: Sum of any two sides of a triangle must be greater than the third side.
